name: Philips AirPurifier CoAP Dev
postCreateCommand: python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements_test.txt
postStartCommand: test -x .venv/bin/python || python -m venv .venv; .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements_test.txt
